heading: Liability of vessel
label: 450 Liability of vessel
text: Any boat or vessel used or employed in violating any provision of this subchapter, shall be liable to the pecuniary penalties imposed thereby, and may be proceeded against, summarily by way of libel in any district court of the United States having jurisdiction thereof.
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of section 4 of act , which enacted sections 449 and 450 of this title.June 29, 1888
